{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Forged silver runes
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A loop of [[Forged silver runes]] spins around [[Ziel]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
